application.name: Foxglove endoscopy tool tracking
application.description: Python entry point for publishing the endoscopy tool-tracking graph to Foxglove Studio.

changelog.0.1.0: Initial Python example for the Foxglove operator using the HoloHub endoscopy tool-tracking workflow.

data.name: Holoscan Sample App Data for AI-based Endoscopy Tool Tracking
data.description: Convolutional LSTM model and sample surgical video used by the HoloHub endoscopy tool-tracking workflow.

replayer.description: Run the application in replayer mode.
